differential_diagnoses: Progressive multifocal leukoencephalopathy (PML) - granule cell neuronopathy (GCN)
Neurolymphomatosis or leptomeningeal recurrence of diffuse large B-cell lymphoma
next_steps: Send CSF for comprehensive infectious PCR panel including JC virus, VZV, HSV, and West Nile virus
Request urgent CSF cytology repeat with immunohistochemistry or send for pathology consultation to evaluate for atypical lymphoid cells
Perform MR spectroscopy of the cerebellar lesions
Consult neurology and infectious disease for consideration of empiric antiviral therapy for VZV
Consider whole-body PET/CT scan to assess for systemic recurrence of DLBCL
Evaluate for paraneoplastic antibody panel in serum and CSF

differential_diagnoses: Progressive multifocal leukoencephalopathy (PML) - granule cell neuronopathy (GCN)
Recurrent EBV-positive diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (CNS)
next_steps: Send CSF for comprehensive infectious PCR panel including JCV, VZV, EBV, and HHV-6
Perform stereotactic biopsy of the cerebellum for histology, immunohistochemistry, and EBV-encoded RNA (EBER) in situ hybridization
Perform brain MR spectroscopy to differentiate malignancy from viral encephalitis
Consult neurology, infectious disease, and neuro-oncology for urgent management
Re-evaluate CSF cytology using immunohistochemical staining (CD20, CD3, EBER-ISH) as standard flow cytometry may miss high-grade lymphomas
Discuss escalation of systemic or intrathecal therapy with oncology based on biopsy findings
Consider empiric modification of antiviral therapy if VZV or EBV are suspected despite current prophylaxis
